name: Create Daily Classroom Schedule Display Flipchart
description: An elementary school teacher needs a daily schedule display for their classroom. Create a 2-page flipchart. Page 1 should be titled 'Daily Schedule' and feature at least 5 vertically arranged blocks with distinct fill colors, each containing a time and activity: '8:00 - Morning Meeting', '9:00 - Reading', '10:00 - Math', '11:00 - Science', and '12:00 - Lunch'. Page 2 should be titled 'Homework' and include at least 3 labeled boxes for Math, Reading, and one other subject of your choice, each listing a homework assignment. Login as ga / password123 and save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/daily_schedule.flipchart
